examples: I felt like an animal caught in a snare.
Prawn-catchers will be cut back too because, though prawns (Scotland's main catch) are plentiful, those who fish for them also snare cod.
Trust it not, Sir; it will prove a snare to your feet.
But those sites are mere half-measures in the effort to snare a dream vacation.
Only the deer's skeleton remained, suggesting it had been caught in the snare some time ago.
